query:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(locked.bal), 0.0) AS "total!"
                    FROM (
                        SELECT CAST(lb.balance_hours AS FLOAT8) AS bal
                        FROM leave_balances lb
                        WHERE lb.user_id = $1 AND lb.org_id = $2 AND lb.leave_type_id = $3
                        FOR UPDATE OF lb
                    ) locked
